content.query:
CREATE VIEW BI_SupplierInvoiceDetails
-- Drop view BI_SupplierInvoiceDetails

AS

SELECT 
L.DIVI AS [Division],
L.YEA4 AS [Year],
L.RGDT AS [Entry Date],
L.ACDT AS [Accounting Date],
L.ACAM AS [Amount],
L.VONO AS [Voucher Number],
L.VTXT AS [Voucher Text],
L.TRCD AS [Transaction Code],
L.JRNO AS [Journal Number],
L.AIT1 AS [GL],
N.TX40 AS [GL Description],
L.AIT2 AS [Business Unit],
L.AIT3 AS [CC],
L.AIT4 AS [Brand],
S.SUNO AS [Supplier Number],
SN.SUNM AS [Supplier Name],
S.SUCL AS [Supplier Group],
S.APCD AS [Authorized User],
S.SINO AS [Supplier Invoice Number],
S.IVDT AS [Invoice Date],
S.RECO AS [Internal Reconciliation Code],
TRY_CAST(
        LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), S.REDE), 4) + '-' + 
        SUBSTRING(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), S.REDE), 5, 2) + '-' + 
        RIGHT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), S.REDE), 2) AS DATE) AS [Reconciliation Date]
FROM M3.FGLEDG L
LEFT JOIN M3.FPLEDG S ON L.VONO = S.VONO AND L.JRNO = S.JRNO AND L.YEA4 = S.YEA4
LEFT JOIN M3.FCHACC N ON L.AIT1 = N.AITM AND N.AITP = 1
LEFT JOIN M3.CIDMAS SN ON S.SUNO = SN.SUNO
WHERE
        L.TRCD IN ('40', '41') AND
        L.FNCN = '120' AND -- 120 Approved Coded
        L.YEA4 >= '2025' AND
        L.AIT1 >= '600000' AND L.AIT1 < '800000' -- AP GLs
